scripts.build: pnpm --filter @pkg/shared --filter @pkg/logger --filter @pkg/config --filter @pkg/binance --filter @pkg/storage --filter @pkg/notifications --filter @pkg/risk --filter @pkg/strategy run build && pnpm --filter @app/api --filter @app/engine --filter @app/backtester run build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @pkg/binance test && pnpm --filter @pkg/storage test && pnpm --filter @pkg/strategy test && pnpm --filter @pkg/testing test && pnpm --filter @app/engine test && pnpm --filter @app/backtester test
scripts.backtest:fetch: pnpm --filter @app/backtester exec node --import tsx src/cli.ts --fetch --data-dir backtest-data --symbols BTCUSDT,ETHUSDT --years 5
scripts.backtest:run: pnpm --filter @app/backtester exec node --import tsx src/cli.ts --data-dir backtest-data --out backtest-out
scripts.backtest:oos: pnpm --filter @app/backtester exec node --import tsx src/cli.ts --data-dir backtest-data --out backtest-out --oos 0.3
scripts.backtest:walkforward: pnpm --filter @app/backtester exec node --import tsx src/cli.ts --data-dir backtest-data --out backtest-out --walkforward
scripts.backtest:synthetic: pnpm --filter @app/backtester exec node --import tsx src/cli.ts --synthetic --out backtest-out
